evals.prompt: You are the checker. A builder says the fix is ready. Validate it and report the result to the coordinator.
evals.expected_output: Inspects the contract, diff, scripts, and CI conventions, runs targeted then broader quality gates, and reports pass/fail evidence without editing code.
assertions: Runs existing repo-defined commands before inventing new ones.
Reports exact failing commands and next owner when checks fail.
Records any skipped gate and residual risk.
